text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament, on control of the Strait of Hormuz: "If they had realized we would achieve such a position and take control of the Strait of Hormuz, perhaps they would have been more cautious in going to war with us." Now not…" 🇮🇷 "It must be accepted that now the world has four superpowers. One of the superpowers is the Islamic Republic." Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament: America caused Iran to become an international power sooner than America thought. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊（Haji Babaei）谈霍尔木兹海峡的控制权：‘如果他们早意识到我们会达到这样的地位并控制霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们在与我们开战时会更加谨慎。’ 现在不是……” 🇮🇷 “必须承认，现在世界上有四个超级大国。其中一个超级大国就是伊斯兰共和国。” 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊：美国促使伊朗比美国预想的更早成为国际大国。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: NOW: Péter Magyar: TISZA not only won this election, but every sign points towards having a strong two-thirds majority in the new National Assembly.
text_zh: 即时：彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）：TISZA不仅赢得了这次选举，而且所有迹象都表明，它将在新国民议会中拥有强大的三分之二多数席位。

text: NEW: Regional countries are racing to bring the U.S. and Iran back to the negotiating table after marathon peace talks in Islamabad ended without a deal. Despite defiant statements from the U.S. and Iran the door remains open for further diplomacy and a second round of talks could be held within days. Regional countries were also in consultation with the U.S. to secure an extension of two-week ceasefire. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 最新：在伊斯兰堡举行的马拉松式和平谈判无果而终后，地区国家正竞相促使美国和伊朗重返谈判桌。尽管美国和伊朗发表了强硬声明，但外交大门依然敞开，第二轮谈判可能在几天内举行。地区国家也在与美国磋商，以确保两周的停火协议得到延长。来源：华尔街日报

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command forces announced that they will begin a blockade of all maritime traffic entering or exiting Iranian ports on 13 April at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The blockade will be enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or departing Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. CENTCOM will not impede vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non‑Iranian ports. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部部队宣布，将于4月13日东部时间上午10:00开始封锁所有进出伊朗港口的海上交通。该封锁将公正地针对所有进出阿拉伯湾和阿曼湾伊朗港口的各国船只。中央司令部不会阻碍往返非伊朗港口并过境霍尔木兹海峡的船只。 @wfwitness

text: BREAKING: CENTCOM says the U.S. will begin a naval blockade of all ships entering or leaving Iranian ports on April 13 at 10 a.m. ET. The blockade applies to vessels of all nations but will not affect ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz to non-Iranian ports. Mariners are advised to follow official notices and maintain communication with U.S. naval forces in the region.
text_zh: 突发：中央司令部称，美国将于4月13日东部时间上午10点开始对所有进出伊朗港口的船只实施海上封锁。封锁适用于所有国家的船只，但不会影响过境霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的船只。建议海员遵循官方通知，并与该地区的美军保持联系。

text: Open Source Intel Regional sources told the Wall Street Journal that Middle Eastern states are rushing to bring the U.S. and Iran back to negotiations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：地区消息人士告诉《华尔街日报》，中东国家正急于促使美国和伊朗重返谈判。推文

text: The Spectator Index Lebanon's war death toll has risen to 2,055, according to the country's health ministry. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数：据黎巴嫩卫生部称，黎巴嫩的战争死亡人数已升至2,055人。推文

text: Open Source Intel A second round of U.S.–Iran talks could be held within days as regional countries push to revive negotiations, officials told The Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：官员告诉《华尔街日报》，随着地区国家推动恢复谈判，美伊第二轮谈判可能在几天内举行。推文

text: WarTranslated RT @magyarpeterMP : Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has just called to congratulate us on our victory. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 转发 @magyarpeterMP：维克托·欧尔班总理刚刚致电祝贺我们取得胜利。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian lead negotiator Ghalibaf taunts president Trump: “Enjoy the current pump figures. With the so-called 'blockade', Soon you'll be nostalgic for $4–$5 gas.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043426880007614846/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗首席谈判代表卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）嘲讽特朗普总统：“享受现在的油价吧。随着所谓的‘封锁’，很快你就会怀念4-5美元的汽油了。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043426880007614846/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ahmad Vahidi, IRGC chief, on Iranian parliament speaker Ghalibaf: “The supreme leader isn’t even buried yet, and yet Ghalibaf is already shaking hands with those who kiIIed him.” -C14 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043426576209997833/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官艾哈迈德·瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi）谈及伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：“最高领袖甚至还没下葬，卡利巴夫就已经在和那些杀害他的人握手了。” -C14 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043426576209997833/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Embarrassing trip this past week for U.S. Vice President JD Vance and the Trump Administration, beginning with a visit to Hungary to campaign for Prime Minister Viktor Orbán, who just suffered one of the worst defeats in a European Parliamentary Election, and ending with failed peace negotiations in Islamabad to end the ongoing Iran War. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：过去一周对美国副总统JD·万斯和特朗普政府来说是一次尴尬的行程，从访问匈牙利为维克托·欧尔班总理竞选开始——欧尔班刚刚在欧洲议会选举中遭遇了最惨痛的失败之一——到在伊斯兰堡结束正在进行的伊朗战争的和平谈判失败告终。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2043426471675298025/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2043426471675298025/photo/1 推文

text: Zelensky: I congratulate Peter Magyar and the TISZA party on their convincing victory. It’s important when a constructive approach wins. Ukraine has always strived for good-neighborly relations with everyone in Europe, and we are ready to develop cooperation with Hungary. We are ready for meetings and joint constructive work for the benefit of both peoples, as well as for peace, security, and stability in Europe.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我祝贺彼得·马扎尔和TISZA党取得令人信服的胜利。当建设性的方法获胜时，这很重要。乌克兰一直致力于与欧洲所有国家建立睦邻友好关系，我们准备发展与匈牙利的合作。我们准备好进行会晤并开展联合建设性工作，以造福两国人民，并促进欧洲的和平、安全与稳定。

text: NOW: Péter Magyar: Together we have replaced the Orbán regime, together we have liberated Hungary, we have taken back our homeland.
text_zh: 即时：彼得·马扎尔：我们共同取代了欧尔班政权，我们共同解放了匈牙利，我们夺回了我们的祖国。

text: The Spectator Index President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, says that Hungary has 'chosen Europe' and returned to 'its European path' after defeat of Viktor Orban at today's election. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043425529710424326/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数：欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩表示，在维克托·欧尔班于今日选举中落败后，匈牙利已“选择了欧洲”，并回到了“其欧洲道路”上。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043425529710424326/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @alexplitsas : Happy to report that @shellykittleson is on her way to recovery and the epitome of resilience You’ll hear from her soon Thank you to everyone who helped to set her free https://twitter.com/alexplitsas/status/2043412718200242388/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @alexplitsas：很高兴报告 @shellykittleson 正在康复中，她是韧性的缩影。你很快就会听到她的消息。感谢所有帮助她获得自由的人 https://twitter.com/alexplitsas/status/2043412718200242388/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary’s Viktor Orban: “The election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, painful for us, but unequivocal. The opportunity and responsibility of governing were not given to us, I congratulated the winning party.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043424662059675920/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：匈牙利的维克托·欧尔班：“选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但可以理解且清晰，对我们来说是痛苦的，但却是明确的。治理的机会和责任没有交给我们，我祝贺了获胜的政党。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043424662059675920/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Quds Force Commander Esmail Qaani: "The United Resistance Front is present in the entire region with power and effectiveness, and is waiting for the enemies of humanity. The US and Israel will remember how they fled empty-handed from Yemen the heroine, from the Strait of Bab al-Mandab and the Red Sea. This time too they will leave the area without any achievement." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）：“统一抵抗阵线正以力量和效力存在于整个地区，并等待着人类的敌人。美国和以色列会记得他们是如何从女英雄也门、从曼德海峡和红海空手而逃的。这一次，他们也将一无所获地离开该地区。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv RT @disclosetv : NOW - Italy's former PM, criticizes Orban blocking the 90B loan to Ukraine, says EU "has tools to oblige one country to be reliable," and that EU is "a collective leadership" with "minimum rules of solidarity among the leaders and fairness, and I think Orban broke these rules." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043043930011218309/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 转发 @disclosetv：即时——意大利前总理批评欧尔班阻止向乌克兰提供900亿贷款，称欧盟“有工具迫使一个国家变得可靠”，并称欧盟是“集体领导”，具有“领导人之间最低限度的团结规则和公平性，我认为欧尔班打破了这些规则。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043043930011218309/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender With over 84% of the votes counted, Péter Magyar and his centre-right conservative Tisza Party have already far exceeded expectations, securing 138 of 199 total seats in the Hungarian Parliament, providing them a supermajority over Prime Minister Viktor Orbán and his Christian nationalist far-right Fidesz–KDNP Party Alliance. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：随着超过84%的选票统计完毕，彼得·马扎尔和他的中右翼保守派Tisza党已经远远超出了预期，在匈牙利议会199个席位中获得了138席，这使他们对维克托·欧尔班总理及其基督教民族主义极右翼青民盟-基民党联盟（Fidesz–KDNP）形成了绝对多数优势。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : @trail93435 Criticizing how a war is handled, or even opposing it, doesn’t mean someone is defending Iran. Some of us can think beyond a simple us-vs-them narrative. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @TheWarMonitor：@trail93435 批评战争的处理方式，甚至反对战争，并不意味着有人在为伊朗辩护。我们中的一些人可以超越简单的“我们对他们”的叙事进行思考。推文

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on X. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）在X上发文。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: After recent losses and damage to its aerial refueling fleet during operations linked to the Iran conflict, the U.S. Air Force has reactivated retired KC-135 tanker aircraft from storage. This includes a 68-year-old Stratotanker built in 1958, now undergoing maintenance for possible return to service. Source: Bild
text_zh: 在与伊朗冲突相关的行动中，空中加油机队遭受损失和破坏后，美国空军已重新启用了封存的退役KC-135加油机。其中包括一架1958年制造、现年68岁的同温层加油机，目前正在进行维护，准备重返服役。来源：图片报

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 ⚡ Trump had invested significant efforts in recent weeks to promote Orbán. Even last week, Trump sent his Vice President, J.D. Vance, to Hungary to express further strong public support for Orbán. Vance promised investments and economic support but Hungarians didn't buy those promises.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 ⚡ 特朗普在过去几周投入了大量精力来宣传欧尔班。就在上周，特朗普还派遣副总统JD·万斯前往匈牙利，以表达对欧尔班进一步强有力的公开支持。万斯承诺了投资和经济支持，但匈牙利人并不买账。

text: Apple Maps appears to have removed the names of all villages in southern Lebanon. This is the exact area Israel is currently trying to occupy.
text_zh: 苹果地图似乎删除了黎巴嫩南部所有村庄的名称。这正是以色列目前试图占领的区域。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Enjoy the current pump figures. With the so-called 'blockade'. Soon you'll be nostalgic for $4–$5 gas.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：享受现在的油价吧。随着所谓的“封锁”。很快你就会怀念4-5美元的汽油了。

text: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Union, celebrates Orban’s defeat in Hungary:

text_zh: 观察家指数：担任总理16年的维克托·欧尔班已承认在匈牙利选举中落败。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043423761618309372/photo/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸: 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 I spoke with Irishman and SMO veteran Aiden Minnis, recipient of the Medal of Suvorov for courage, to ask him how he felt about going back to the front after spending nearly two weeks in Moscow on vacation for the first time in 15 months. Here are his thoughts. Victory is ours, comrade! 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 Follow me Christopher Helali, on YouTube , X, Instagram, and TikTok
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Christopher Helali 🇷🇺🇺🇸：🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🫡 🎖 我与爱尔兰人、特别军事行动老兵、苏沃洛夫勋章获得者艾登·明尼斯（Aiden Minnis）进行了交谈，询问他在15个月内首次在莫斯科度假近两周后，对重返前线有何感想。以下是他的想法。胜利属于我们，同志！ 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 在YouTube、X、Instagram和TikTok上关注我，Christopher Helali

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron: I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 More European leaders congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory over Viktor Orbán. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向民主参与的胜利、匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的依恋致敬……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇸🇪 🇳🇴 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 🇭🇷 更多欧洲领导人祝贺彼得·马扎尔在选举中战胜维克托·欧尔班。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban reassured Hungarians from the opposition. "But no matter how it turned out, we from the opposition will serve our country and the Hungarian nation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认议会选举结果。‘亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但可以理解且清晰，选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予责任和……’” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班向反对派中的匈牙利人保证。‘但无论结果如何，我们作为反对派将服务于我们的国家和匈牙利民族。’ @wfwitness

text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found.
text_zh: 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安（Masoud Pezeshkian）：如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，那么达成协议的途径肯定会找到。

text: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 "Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight." - Reich Gauleitierin von der Leyen 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 “今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加强烈。” - 帝国大区长冯德莱恩 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: EU's von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. A country returns to its European path. The Union becomes stronger.
text_zh: 欧盟的冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。一个国家回到了它的欧洲道路上。欧盟变得更加强大。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 EU commission President Von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. Together, we are stronger. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron: I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union, and for Hungary in Europe. Together, let us advance a more sovereign Europe, for the security of our continent, our competitiveness, and our democracy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。我们在一起更强大。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利取得胜利！法国向民主参与的胜利、匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的依恋，以及匈牙利在欧洲的地位致敬。让我们共同推进一个更主权、为了我们大陆的安全、我们的竞争力和我们的民主的欧洲。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament, on control of the Strait of Hormuz: "If they had realized we would achieve such a position and take control of the Strait of Hormuz, perhaps they would have been more cautious in going to war with us." Now not only are we not sanctioned, but any country we want can be sanctioned: America is sanctioned, the regime is sanctioned." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊谈霍尔木兹海峡的控制权：“如果他们早意识到我们会达到这样的地位并控制霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们在与我们开战时会更加谨慎。” 现在不仅我们没有受到制裁，而且任何我们想制裁的国家都可以被制裁：美国受到了制裁，该政权受到了制裁。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: An Israeli strike in south Lebanon killed a 1.5-year-old girl and several of her relatives as they gathered for her father’s funeral. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 以色列在黎巴嫩南部的一次袭击中，一名1.5岁的女童及其几名亲属在参加她父亲的葬礼时丧生。来源：路透社

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 European Commission president Ursula Von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 EU commission President Von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. Together, we are stronger. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加强烈。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。我们在一起更强大。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇭🇺 Orbán acknowledged his party’s defeat in the Hungarian parliamentary elections. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：🇭🇺 欧尔班承认其政党在匈牙利议会选举中落败。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: John Bolton supports Trump's blockade: A blockade makes sense.
text_zh: 约翰·博尔顿支持特朗普的封锁：封锁是有道理的。

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The leader of the Patriotic Union of Kurdistan, Bafel Talabani, apologized to neighboring Arab countries that have come under attack from Iraqi soil, offering condolences and expressing shame. He pledged that Iraq’s new government, of which the PUK will be a leading part, will ensure arms are only in the hands of the state, move Iraq away from war, and embrace Arab brothers. He thanked Pakistan, European countries, Turkey, the US, and Iran for their efforts, urging all sides to continue dialogue: “Perhaps these talks can not only end this conflict, but be the start of ending the majority of the issues in the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 库尔德斯坦爱国联盟领导人巴费尔·塔拉巴尼（Bafel Talabani）向遭受来自伊拉克境内袭击的邻近阿拉伯国家道歉，表示慰问并表达了羞愧。他承诺，库尔德斯坦爱国联盟将作为主要组成部分的伊拉克新政府将确保武器只掌握在国家手中，使伊拉克远离战争，并拥抱阿拉伯兄弟。他感谢巴基斯坦、欧洲国家、土耳其、美国和伊朗所做的努力，敦促各方继续对话：“也许这些谈判不仅能结束这场冲突，还能成为解决中东大部分问题的开端。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Hungarian Prime Minister Orban conceeded the parliamentary elections. "Dear friends, the election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear, the election result is painful for us, but clear, we were not given the responsibility and…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 European Commission president Ursula Von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班承认议会选举结果。‘亲爱的朋友们，选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但可以理解且清晰，选举结果对我们来说是痛苦的，但很明确，我们没有被赋予责任和……’” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加强烈。 @wfwitness

text: EU's von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight.
text_zh: 欧盟的冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加强烈。
